title: best herbal teas for bloating
description: Rosmarinus officinalis tea contains bioactive constituents such as carnosic acid, ursolic acid, and rosmarinic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to alleviate bloating and other digestive issues. This herbal tea also possesses carminative properties, which aid in the elimination of gas and reduce discomfort in the abdominal region.
